install.note: Grok Build is xAI's terminal coding agent. Distributed as a single binary, not via npm. The installer drops `grok` under ~/.grok/bin/. On first launch `grok` opens a browser to authenticate with xAI, or set GROK_CODE_XAI_API_KEY for non-interactive use. As of 2026-05 the CLI is in early beta gated to SuperGrok Heavy subscribers; the install script is live but the binary may require subscription auth.
install.windows: Run the same `curl | bash` flow under Git for Windows / MSYS2 Bash. WSL users get the Linux binary.

identity_guard.description: Grok Build is the official xAI coding CLI (binary name `grok`). Not to be confused with the standalone Grok chat app at grok.com (web/iOS/Android), nor with third-party 'grok-cli' npm packages.
